data.title: Home Depot acquires Simpl Automation for fulfillment operations
data.description: Leaders at Home Depot expect to bolster the retailer's fulfillment network with Simpl's technology and automation expertise.

data.title: VTEX announces AI-focused commerce suite, platform upgrades
data.description: VTEX said the integration with Google's Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) "enables discovery and checkout directly in Gemini and Google AI Mode, with native cart sync."

data.title: New Apple CEO to replace Tim Cook in September
data.description: John Ternus will become Apple's next CEO and join its board of directors as Tim Cook takes over as executive chairman.

data.title: QVC Group files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
data.description: The company said it has not planned layoffs or furloughs in connection with the financial restructuring process. It said all its employees "should fully expect to continue receiving their wages and benefits without interruption."

data.title: Lululemon launches ecommerce site in Mexico
data.description: In March, Lululemon reported 9% year-over-year growth in its digital sales for its fiscal Q4 2025. Digital sales totaled $1.9 billion, comprising more than half of Lululemon’s total quarterly revenue.
